untranslatable_reason: The pattern detection requires identifying two distinct 'bump' lows with the second lower than the first, followed by an upward breakout. This multi-bar structural pattern recognition cannot be expressed using the available point-in-time indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.). Pattern detection requires custom bar-sequence logic or swing-point identification not available in the standard indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a chart pattern (Dual Bump-and-Run Reversal Bottom) that requires identifying swing lows and their relative positioning across multiple bars. The core entry rule 'wait for upward breakout' can be approximated as close crossing above recent highs with confirmation above SMA_20, but this does not capture the essential two-bump structure. Exit based on reversal below moving average is a reasonable fallback when author provides no explicit exit guidance (AUTHOR_SILENT). The 33-64% target cannot be encoded as a stop/exit rule without custom profit-target logic.
